original_image_tags: A scan of the back side of a typed document page. The paper is aged, slightly yellowed, with two hole-punch marks at the top center. The page is otherwise blank, showing only the faint, reversed impression of text from the other side (bleed-through). There is a small tear or damage in the upper right corner. No distinct, legible primary text is present on this face of the page.

elements.description: A single blank or back side of a page with faint bleed-through text. It features two black circular hole-punch marks at the top and a single horizontal black line at the bottom center.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is the back side of a document with faint bleed-through text, two hole-punch marks at the top, and no distinct visual content, with no contradictions on visual elements described.
